CreateTableOrView.name: CreateTableOrView
CreateTableOrView.description: Create either a table (SAS data set) or view from either specified parameters, metadata data set, or shell data sets.
CreateTableOrView.author: Scott Bass
CreateTableOrView.outputData: SAS / SQL data set or SAS / SQL view

IsNum.name: IsNum
IsNum.description: Checks if alphanumeric (character) input is valid numeric data. Also sets additional flag variables for IsInt, IsFloat, IsNonNeg, IsPos, etc.
IsNum.author: Scott Bass
IsNum.inputData: Character data in a data step

IsNumD.name: IsNumD
IsNumD.description: Checks if alphanumeric (character) input is valid numeric data (data step). Also sets additional flag variables for IsInt, IsFloat, IsNonNeg, IsPos, etc.
IsNumD.author: Scott Bass
IsNumD.inputData: Character data in a data step

IsNumM.name: IsNumM
IsNumM.description: Checks if alphanumeric MACRO variable input (which is always character data) is valid numeric data. Optionally checks for IsInt, IsNonNeg, or IsPos.
IsNumM.author: Scott Bass
IsNumM.inputData: Alphanumeric data contained in a macro variable.
IsNumM.outputData: Return code indicating IsNum, IsInt, IsNonNeg, or IsPos.

RunAll.name: RunAll
RunAll.description: Runs SAS programs asynchronously and multi-threaded, honoring any job dependencies.
RunAll.author: Scott Bass

age.name: age
age.description: Determines a person's age in <units> based on a reference date
age.author: Scott Bass

align_decimals.name: align_decimals
align_decimals.description: Aligns the decimal points of numeric or character variables, optionally adding additional bracketing characters (usually parentheses).
align_decimals.author: Scott Bass

attrib.name: attrib
attrib.description: Generate attrib statements from a template dataset
attrib.author: Scott Bass

batch_submit.name: batch_submit
batch_submit.description: Submits the current SAS DMS editor session in batch mode, routing the log and print files to the correct output locations.
batch_submit.author: Scott Bass

bench.name: bench
bench.description: Measures elapsed time between successive invocations.
bench.author: Scott Bass

check_if_empty.name: check_if_empty
check_if_empty.description: Checks if the source dataset is empty.
check_if_empty.author: Scott Bass

compare.name: compare
compare.description: PROC COMPARE either two datasets or two libraries
compare.author: Scott Bass
compare.inputData: Either Base and Compare datasets or Base and Compare libraries

count_words.name: count_words
count_words.description: Returns the number of words delimited by a delimiter or set of delimiters.
count_words.author: Scott Bass

create_datetime_range.name: create_datetime_range
create_datetime_range.description: Create min and max datetime values for a given period
create_datetime_range.author: Scott Bass

create_directory.name: create_directory
create_directory.description: Creates a directory using the dlcreatedir option, without requiring the ALLOWXCMD option to be active.
create_directory.author: Scott Bass

create_format.name: create_format
create_format.description: Create a format from an input dataset.
create_format.author: Scott Bass

dedup_mstring.name: dedup_mstring
dedup_mstring.description: Removes duplicate words from a macro variable string
dedup_mstring.author: Scott Bass

dedup_string.name: dedup_string
dedup_string.description: Removes duplicate items from a string
dedup_string.author: Scott Bass
dedup_string.inputData: Data step string containing duplicate tokens
dedup_string.outputData: Data step string with duplicates removed

delete_file.name: delete_file
delete_file.description: Deletes an external file, either by physical filename or by pre-allocated fileref.
delete_file.author: Scott Bass

dirlist.name: dirlist
dirlist.description: Creates a SAS dataset containing a directory list of external files.
dirlist.author: Scott Bass

dump_mvars.name: dump_mvars
dump_mvars.description: Dumps macro variables to the log.
dump_mvars.author: Scott Bass

empty.name: empty
empty.description: Checks if the source dataset is empty.
empty.author: Scott Bass

excel2sas.name: excel2sas
excel2sas.description: Read an Excel workbook into a SAS dataset(s) using PROC IMPORT
excel2sas.author: Scott Bass

execpath.name: execpath
execpath.description: Returns either the full path or the file name of the currently executing program, in all of DMS, EG, line mode, and batch mode, on both Unix and Windows.
execpath.author: Scott Bass

execute_macro.name: execute_macro
execute_macro.description: Execute a macro if the macro exists. If the macro does not exist do nothing.
execute_macro.author: Scott Bass

export_csv.name: export_csv
export_csv.description: Wrapper macro for the %export_dlm macro used to export a SAS dataset to a CSV file.
export_csv.author: Scott Bass

export_dbms.name: export_dbms
export_dbms.description: Wrapper macro for PROC EXPORT used to export a SAS dataset to an external file.
export_dbms.author: Scott Bass

export_dlm.name: export_dlm
export_dlm.description: Replacement macro for PROC EXPORT for exporting a SAS dataset to a delimited file.
export_dlm.author: Scott Bass

export_rldx.name: export_rldx
export_rldx.description: Wrapper macro to call various child macros to export a SAS dataset or SQL Server table to various target formats.
export_rldx.author: Scott Bass
export_rldx.inputData: SAS dataset or SQL Server table
export_rldx.requiredMacros: parmv export_dlm export_dbms export_csv export_spss export_stata export_saphari

export_saphari.name: export_saphari
export_saphari.description: Export SAS dataset or SQL Server table to Saphari.
export_saphari.author: Scott Bass
export_saphari.inputData: SAS dataset or SQL Server table
export_saphari.outputData: SAS dataset(s) and view(s) required for use by Saphari

export_sas.name: export_sas
export_sas.description: Simple macro to copy a source dataset to a target library with some additional error checking.
export_sas.author: Scott Bass

export_spss.name: export_spss
export_spss.description: Wrapper macro for the %export_dbms macro used to export a SAS dataset to an SPSS file.
export_spss.author: Scott Bass

export_stata.name: export_stata
export_stata.description: Wrapper macro for the %export_dbms macro used to export a SAS dataset to a STATA file.
export_stata.author: Scott Bass

export_tab.name: export_tab
export_tab.description: Wrapper macro for the %export_dlm macro used to export a SAS dataset to a TDF file.
export_tab.author: Scott Bass

export_xlsx.name: export_xlsx
export_xlsx.description: Wrapper macro for the %export_dbms macro used to export a SAS dataset to an XLSX file.
export_xlsx.author: Scott Bass

fmtexist.name: fmtexist
fmtexist.description: Checks the format searchpath for the existence of a format or informat.
fmtexist.author: Scott Bass

fmtlist.name: fmtlist
fmtlist.description: Prints contents of one or more format or informat entries.
fmtlist.author: Scott Bass

get_data_attr.name: get_data_attr
get_data_attr.description: Function style macro to return a dataset attribute.
get_data_attr.author: Scott Bass

get_dups.name: get_dups
get_dups.description: Identifies duplicate records given a list of variables
get_dups.author: Scott Bass

get_lib_attr.name: get_lib_attr
get_lib_attr.description: Function style macro to return a library attribute.
get_lib_attr.author: Scott Bass

get_parameters.name: get_parameters
get_parameters.description: Get global and optional job-specific parameters (macro variables) from a specially structured metadata dataset
get_parameters.author: Scott Bass

getpassword.name: getpassword
getpassword.description: Gets a password from an external file
getpassword.author: Scott Bass
getpassword.inputData: External file containing a password on line 1, optionally in column 1

handle.name: handle
handle.description: Print a list of open file handles to the SAS log
handle.author: Scott Bass

hash_define.name: hash_define
hash_define.description: Defines a hash object for later lookup.
hash_define.author: Scott Bass

hash_lookup.name: hash_lookup
hash_lookup.description: Lookup satellite variables from a hash object.
hash_lookup.author: Scott Bass

hash_split_dataset.name: hash_split_dataset
hash_split_dataset.description: Use hash object to split dataset into multiple datasets
hash_split_dataset.author: Scott Bass

justify.name: justify
justify.description: Creates a macro variable with text left, center, and right justified within a given width (usually the linesize). (pure macro solution)
justify.author: Scott Bass

kill.name: kill
kill.description: Deletes specified contents from a library
kill.author: Scott Bass

libname_attr_sqlsvr.name: libname_attr_sqlsvr
libname_attr_sqlsvr.description: Retrieve libname attributes (server name, database name, default schema) from an ODBC libname allocated to a SQL Server instance.
libname_attr_sqlsvr.author: Scott Bass

libname_sqlsvr.name: libname_sqlsvr
libname_sqlsvr.description: Allocate a SQL Server library via ODBC
libname_sqlsvr.author: Scott Bass

lock.name: lock
lock.description: Obtain or clear a dataset lock.
lock.author: Scott Bass

loop.name: loop
loop.description: A "wrapper" macro to execute code over a list of items
loop.author: Scott Bass

loop_control.name: loop_control
loop_control.description: A "wrapper" macro to execute code over a list of items defined in a control table
loop_control.author: Scott Bass

marker.name: marker
marker.description: Process marker files used to control job scheduling
marker.author: Scott Bass

max_decimals.name: max_decimals
max_decimals.description: Derives the maximum number of decimal places within a given variable(s), either for the entire dataset or by groups.
max_decimals.author: Scott Bass

nobs.name: nobs
nobs.description: Return the number of observations in a data set.
nobs.author: Scott Bass
nobs.outputData: # of observations in the data set

optload.name: optload
optload.description: Loads SAS options for an options dataset
optload.author: Scott Bass

optsave.name: optsave
optsave.description: Saves current options settings to a SAS dataset
optsave.author: Scott Bass

pagexofy.name: pagexofy
pagexofy.description: Add page numbers to output, usually in the form of "Page x of Y".
pagexofy.author: Scott Bass

parmv.name: parmv
parmv.description: Macro parameter validation utility. Returns parmerr=1 and writes ERROR message to log for parameters with invalid values.
parmv.author: Scott Bass

queryActiveDirectory.name: queryActiveDirectory
queryActiveDirectory.description: Execute an LDAP query against Active Directory
queryActiveDirectory.author: Scott Bass
queryActiveDirectory.outputData: WORK.LDAP data step view of Active Directory

randlist.name: randlist
randlist.description: Macro to create a random list of data
randlist.author: Scott Bass

realloc_concat_libs.name: realloc_concat_libs
realloc_concat_libs.description: Reallocate concatenated libraries so that all levels > 1 are allocated as readonly
realloc_concat_libs.author: Scott Bass

reduce_pixel.name: reduce_pixel
reduce_pixel.description: Macro to reduce a map based on the pixel size of the output.  Creates a map dataset that has reduced size and also removes single- and dual-point polygons.
reduce_pixel.author: Scott Bass

sendmail.name: sendmail
sendmail.description: Macro to send an email using a metadata dataset
sendmail.author: Scott Bass

seplist.name: seplist
seplist.description: Emit a list of words separated by a delimiter.
seplist.author: Scott Bass

splitvar.name: splitvar
splitvar.description: In-datastep macro to insert split characters in a string variable.
splitvar.author: Scott Bass

sql_datetime.name: sql_datetime
sql_datetime.description: Converts a SAS datetime literal to a SQL Server datetime literal.
sql_datetime.author: Scott Bass

squote.name: squote
squote.description: Wrap the argument in single quotes
squote.author: Scott Bass
squote.outputData: Single quoted text or resolved macro variable

stp_batch_submit.name: stp_batch_submit
stp_batch_submit.description: Submit a SAS batch program from a Stored Process
stp_batch_submit.author: Scott Bass

stp_seplist.name: stp_seplist
stp_seplist.description: Transform stored process (STP) multi-select macro variable array into a separated list output.
stp_seplist.author: Scott Bass
stp_seplist.inputData: Series of macro variables created by a STP.

subset_data.name: subset_data
subset_data.description: Subset the input dataset by observations and variables. Also rename variables.
subset_data.author: Scott Bass

symget.name: symget
symget.description: Get value for global macro variable that is hidden by local macro variable.
symget.author: Scott Bass

time_interval.name: time_interval
time_interval.description: Create a metadata dataset of date, time, or datetime values for a specified time interval.
time_interval.author: Scott Bass

useridToEmail.name: useridToEmail
useridToEmail.description: Maps a userid to the corresponding email address
useridToEmail.author: Scott Bass
useridToEmail.inputData: LAN Userid Data step view created by %QueryActiveDirectory

varexist.name: varexist
varexist.description: Check for the existence of a specified variable, optionally returning attributes.
varexist.author: Scott Bass

varlist.name: varlist
varlist.description: Returns a string containing a space separated list of variables in a dataset
varlist.author: Scott Bass

varlist2.name: varlist2
varlist2.description: Returns a string containing a space separated list of variables in a dataset.  Supports dataset options and sorting of the returned variable list.
varlist2.author: Scott Bass
